title: FireBallMod
description: This mod add a new item, explosive fireball, you need wind charge and fire charge to make it!
body:
You can have a fireball mod and use it like the wind charge!But it is more interesting than wind charge!The idea come from bedwars, but it CANNOT break the blocks, I'll make it in the lastest releases.

You can use 1 wind charge and 1 fire charge to make 4 fireball.

You can play it in singleplayer world and multiplayer world.In the server, if you want to use it, make sure that the mods is in server mods folder and in the Minecraft verison mods folder.

This mod can only run in 1.21x fabric, make sure you have fabric-api 0.102.0(But you can try to load it in some older version, the author didn't try it:)  )

Have a good time with my mod!
